research.summary: Classified as large greenfield MCP server (complexity 11). Identified finalized spec, TypeScript MCP server patterns, ADR-0001 (phase-loss problem), spike documents. No local Node.js — Docker isolation required. MCP SDK v2 pre-alpha APIs need runtime verification.

specification.summary: Finalized spec (1475 lines) placed as spec.md. 14 sections covering FR-001 through FR-008, NFR-001 through NFR-007, 20 MCP tools, 5 DB tables, Docker architecture. Branch 001-workflow-state-service created.

plan.summary: Bottom-up 5-phase plan (A-E). 32-file manifest. plan.md, research.md, data-model.md, quickstart.md generated. Key decisions: crypto.randomUUID(), programmatic migrations, stateful MCP sessions, service DI with Kysely.

tasks.summary: 60 tasks generated across 6 phases. 28 test tasks (47%). Test-first ordering enforced. Dependency chain: Setup → Foundation → Services → Tools → Server+Docker → Polish.

analyze.summary: 11 findings (0 critical, 2 high, 4 medium, 5 low). Auto-resolved: F1 (uuid dep), F2 (SDK packages), F3 (missing context.ts). User decisions: F4/F5 allocate-task-id → read-only, F6 latency benchmarking → skip MVP, F7 corrupt DB test → added T058a. Gate: PASS (0 critical/high remaining).

implement.summary: Full implementation: 8 tool files (20 MCP tools), 6 service files, 4 DB files, server.ts, Dockerfile, compose.yaml. 307 tests (100% pass): 15 service tests, 43 tool integration tests, 31 edge case tests, 38 schema tests, 1 DB test. Docker build verified.

review.summary: Code review returned CONDITIONAL (5 high, 8 medium, 4 low). All 5 high issues fixed: (1) _close premature closed_at removed, (2) evidence-submitted payload aligned with schema, (3) phase-completed payload includes summary, (4) seq assignment wrapped in transaction via shared event-emitter.ts, (5) type→taskType renamed. Also fixed: updated_at on appendEvent/submitEvidence, shared event-emitter extracted. 307/307 tests pass after fixes.

findings.description: Seq assignment not transactional — race condition
allocate-task-id param named type instead of taskType
No WORKFLOW_HALTED guard on mutation tools
Tool inputs use stringified JSON for complex params
Events emitted by services bypass payload validation
allocate-task-id readOnlyHint: true is accurate but noted

validate.summary: All validations pass. Tests: 307/307 (100%). Compile errors: 0. Spec compliance: 9/9 MVP criteria satisfied (Section 12.1). Task audit: 61/61 tasks completed (T001-T060 + T058a). No TODO/FIXME markers. Docker build verified.

document.summary: Spec drift check identified 2 approved deviations and updated spec.md: (1) Dependencies consolidated from 3 pre-release v2 packages to @modelcontextprotocol/sdk v1.12.x stable, (2) Manual StreamableHTTPServerTransport replaces createMcpExpressApp() for explicit session control. Design Decision #1 updated. NFR-002 updated. No new ADRs needed (ADR-0001 already documents the phase-loss problem). Developer guide (docs/developer-guide.md) already complete from Phase 4.

constraints: No local Node.js — Docker isolation required
MCP SDK v2 pre-alpha APIs — verify with MCP tools at implementation time
context.researchNotes: Greenfield project. Finalized spec covers 20 MCP tools, 5 SQLite tables, Kysely query builder, Zod v4 validation, Docker single-container architecture. ADR-0001 documents the PROGRESS.json phase-loss problem this service solves. TypeScript MCP server instructions available.
